program.name: 90-Day V-Taper Transformation
program.goal: Build wide shoulders, thick back, trim waist. Recomp body composition.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.focus: Build movement patterns, establish baseline strength, begin fat adaptation
phases.notes: Perfect form over heavy weight. Learn to brace core. Establish daily movement habit.

phases.name: Accumulation
phases.focus: Increase volume and time under tension. Push hypertrophy.
phases.notes: Add reps before weight. Track progressive overload. Introduce supersets.

phases.name: Intensification
phases.focus: Peak intensity. Advanced techniques. Maximum V-taper development.
phases.notes: Drop sets, pause reps, tempo training. Push limits safely. Final physique sculpting.

weeklyOverload.label: Baseline
weeklyOverload.strategy: Establish working weights. Perfect form. RPE 6-7.

weeklyOverload.label: Volume +
weeklyOverload.strategy: Same weight. Add 1-2 reps per set. RPE 7-8.

weeklyOverload.label: Intensity +
weeklyOverload.strategy: Add weight (2.5-5lbs). Drop back to base reps. RPE 8-9.

weeklyOverload.label: Deload
weeklyOverload.strategy: Drop weight 20%. Active recovery. RPE 5-6. Let the body adapt.

progressionRules.cycleNote: This 4-week cycle repeats 3 times across the 12-week (90-day) program. Each cycle starts heavier than the last.
